privileged_info_summary: The task asks the agent to convert an image at /home/ga/Desktop/endoscopy_capture.jpg to DICOM and export it to /home/ga/DICOM/exports. The expected patient name is Doe^John, patient ID is ENDO-5512, and modality is ES, which perfectly matches the instructions. The setup script attempts to download a public endoscopy image from Wikimedia Commons but the URL is broken (returns a 404/429 HTML error page). The fallback to generate a synthetic image fails to trigger because the HTML file size is greater than 0, meaning the source 'image' actually presented to the agent is an HTML file. The verifier.py file referenced in task.json is also missing.
